{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220519222FD5A47A289A0CB17A23"}"},"total":519},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7477521779151487806","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看，我一个从来没接触钓鱼的，看着津津有味，从早看到晚，非常推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741002064,"group_id":"7402877494455454744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3+N/Sro/zWDBDNYS5YKGSEGbzB6Ck1aw+97n3iHgxUb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705984&x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"2619457126281418","user_name":"l陌生的旅人l"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2619457126281418","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7402877494455454744","book_info":{"abstract":"回乡创业，打造垂钓圣地？
钓鱼佬陈风，意外得到系统绑定，回到老家连钓五个月，十二万存款钓到只剩五万。
却始终没等到金手指系统再次出现，就在他心灰意冷以为当初是幻听时，系统终于绑定成功。
获得钓场升级功能！
由此承包水库，开办钓场，在系统的帮助下，陈风的钓场逐步越加火热！
全国各地，各种钓鱼大师，无数网红钓手，全都朝着陈风的钓场蜂拥汇聚。
著名大师：“这鲢鳙，打破了我的记录！”
网红钓手：“我钓到了什么，巨物杆秒断，太吓人了，水怪吗？百斤巨青也不这样啊！”
逗比钓友：“去玉龙村水库钓鱼，你得先学会降鱼十八钓，不然就等着下水吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/089afd58490e530cacd5d37adfd95c87","author":"会说话的小水壶","author_id":"","book_id":"7402877494455454744","book_name":"禁渔期被逮，系统逼我开钓场","book_short_name":"钓场经营日记","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7402877655017587224","read_count":"14859","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1328228"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"626","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,系统,钓鱼,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40a31f6c8007641b4c51b640116d30cb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311962&x-signature=2PoVaWdXZOOJtFrH%2FGh5ZFpgZNY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6741949482","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"409"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220519222FD5A47A289A0CB17A23"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读31小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forw rded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19140,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11785},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7438286147028386622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"钓鱼人，钓鱼魂。本书的精彩在用描写钓鱼的过程扣人心弦，在于每次系统升级鱼场的神秘鱼种，等。情感线符合现实中情感的爱情朦胧感，但感觉过快了。主线剧情可以慢慢写，由浅入深，比较要符合大纲。情感线辅助主线，让全文阅读更加具有现实感。人物形象的绘画是可以的，但可以更加细腻一点，毕竟，不论是现实还是虚幻，人物是人们展开想象中形象的地基。本书确实能够成为满足钓鱼人，以及普通人对于钓鱼这项运动的兴趣与想象，和对于鱼类猎获的兴奋感。","text_exts":[{"e":183,"s":180,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741279620CB17A23%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227438286147028386622%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227402877494455454744%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731866188,"group_id":"7402877494455454744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5w6M1w3OMt9HDPIB76Q9jLmRNTxzf8LIEesFb/RRn0j","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2955077864917959","user_name":"爱吃养生豆浆的黄艳红"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2955077864917959","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7402877494455454744","book_info":{"abstract":"回乡创业，打造垂钓圣地？
